allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; tree=json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('tree',[]\); [print\(t['path']\) for t in tree if 'assessment-results' in t['path'] and t['path'].endswith\('.json'\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; tree=json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('tree',[]\); print\(f'Found {len\(tree\)} entries'\); [print\(t['path']\) for t in tree if 'assessment' in t['path']]")
